docs.title: Lokey Lab Knowledge Base
docs.text: Welcome to the Lokey Lab Knowledge Base — a living reference for lab members, collaborators, and future researchers covering computational methods, wet lab protocols, software, hardware, and general institutional knowledge.

docs.title: What's Here
docs.text:
• :material-code-braces: Computational

ML pipelines, virtual screening, molecular representations, and cheminformatics workflows.

Get started →

  • :material-flask: Wet Lab

PAMPA assays, HPLC methods, peptide synthesis protocols, and instrument guides.

Get started →

  • :material-tools: Software & Tools

Internal tools, external software, and data management practices.

Get started →

  • :material-desktop-tower: Hardware & Facilities

Workstations, lab equipment, storage servers, and physical spaces.

Get started →

  • :material-school: Getting Started

New to the lab? Start here — onboarding, contacts, culture, and where to find things.

Get started →

  • :material-pencil: Contributing

How to add or update articles, writing guidelines, and Markdown/LaTeX reference.

Get started →

Found something out of date?

Use the :material-pencil: edit button at the top of any page to propose a correction directly on GitHub.
